nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.description: Trigger every 15 minutes, Monday-Friday 08:00-21:00 Europe/Madrid (market hours)

nodes.name: Yahoo Feed Adapter
nodes.description: CAPA 1 - FEED ADAPTER: Fetches raw market data from Yahoo Finance API for all instruments. Outputs normalized object array.

nodes.name: Normalizer
nodes.description: CAPA 2 - NORMALIZER: Transforms Yahoo Finance response to standard price schema. Cleans symbol suffixes (=X, -USD, =F, ^prefix).

nodes.name: Enrich
nodes.description: CAPA 2b - ENRICH: Add trend_1d (UP/DOWN/FLAT) and alert_level (WATCH/ALERT/NORMAL) based on change thresholds.

nodes.name: Build Snapshot
nodes.description: CAPA 3 - BUILD SNAPSHOT: Generates human-readable price snapshot with sections for FOREX, INDICES, YIELDS, COMMODITIES, and CRYPTO. Includes alert icons.

nodes.name: Store Latest JSON
nodes.description: Store normalized price data as JSON

nodes.name: Store Snapshot TXT
nodes.description: Store human-readable snapshot as TXT

nodes.name: Filter Alerts
nodes.description: Filter items with alert_level WATCH or ALERT

nodes.name: Store Alerts JSON
nodes.description: Store only alerts (WATCH/ALERT) as JSON

nodes.name: Webhook /prices
nodes.description: GET /webhook/prices → Returns complete snapshot (human-readable)

nodes.name: Webhook /prices-raw
nodes.description: GET /webhook/prices-raw → Returns normalized JSON array

nodes.name: Webhook /prices-alerts
nodes.description: GET /webhook/prices-alerts → Returns only WATCH/ALERT items

nodes.name: Webhook /price/{symbol}
nodes.description: GET /webhook/price/{symbol} → Returns price for specific symbol

nodes.name: Alert Webhook
nodes.description: POST to /webhook/price-alert when alert_level = ALERT

nodes.name: Respond /prices
nodes.description: Return snapshot data for /prices webhook

nodes.name: Respond /prices-raw
nodes.description: Return normalized JSON array for /prices-raw webhook

nodes.name: Respond /prices-alerts
nodes.description: Return alerts only for /prices-alerts webhook

nodes.name: Respond /price/{symbol}
nodes.description: Return specific symbol price for /price/{symbol} webhook

nodes.name: Filter Alert Items
nodes.description: Filter only ALERT level items for external webhook notification

nodes.name: Prepare Snapshot TXT
nodes.description: Prepare snapshot text for file storage

nodes.name: Prepare Latest JSON
nodes.description: Prepare data for latest JSON storage

nodes.name: Prepare Alerts JSON
nodes.description: Prepare alerts data for JSON storage

properties.name: price_feed_yahoo
properties.description: Module 8 - Market Prices from Yahoo Finance. Feed-agnostic architecture with normalized output schema.
